description: All 58 counting systems with per-rank and per-color values.

systems.name: Hi-Lo
systems.description: Balanced level-1 system. Low cards (2–6) count as +1, neutrals (7–9) as 0, tens and aces as −1.

systems.name: KO
systems.description: Unbalanced level-1 system (Knock-Out). Low cards (2–7) count as +1, neutrals (8–9) as 0, tens and aces as −1. Trained as a running count.

systems.name: Omega II
systems.description: Balanced level-2 system. 2/3/7 count as +1, 4/5/6 as +2, 8 and aces as 0, 9 as −1, tens and faces as −2.

systems.name: Wong Halves
systems.description: Balanced level-3 system. 2 and 7 count as +0.5, 3/4/6 as +1, 5 as +1.5, 8 as 0, 9 as −0.5, tens and aces as −1. The running count uses fractional (half-point) values.

systems.name: AceMT
systems.description: Unbalanced ace/ten count (AceMT). Aces and tens count as −1; 2–9 are neutral. Trained as a running count.

systems.name: AWK
systems.description: Balanced level-2 system (AWK). 2/3/4/6 = +1, 5 = +2, tens = −1, aces = −2; 7/8/9 neutral.

systems.name: Ambition
systems.description: Balanced fractional system (Ambition, Courter/Tibbetts). 2–6 = +1, 7 = +0.5, 9 = −0.5, tens and aces = −1; 8 neutral. Fractional running count.

systems.name: Ambition-U
systems.description: Unbalanced fractional system (Ambition-U). 2–6 = +1, tens = −1, aces = −0.5; 7/8/9 neutral. Running count only.

systems.name: Andersen
systems.description: Balanced level-2 system (Andersen / Reppert). 2/3/4/6/7 = +1, 5 = +2, 9 and tens = −1, aces = −2; 8 neutral.

systems.name: Archer
systems.description: Unbalanced ten count (Archer). Every non-ten card including aces = +1, tens = −2. Running count only.

systems.name: BRH-0
systems.description: Unbalanced level-2 system (BRH-0). 2–6 = +2, 7 = +1, tens and aces = −2; 8/9 neutral. Running count only.

systems.name: BRH-I
systems.description: Unbalanced level-3 system (BRH-I). 3/4/6 = +2, 5 = +3, 2/7 = +1, tens and aces = −2; 8/9 neutral. Running count only.

systems.name: BRH-II
systems.description: Unbalanced level-2 system (BRH-II). 4/5/6 = +2, 2/3/7 = +1, tens = −2; 8/9 and aces neutral. Running count only.

systems.name: Bushido
systems.description: Unbalanced level-2 system (Bushido). 2–6 = +2, 7 = +1, tens = −2, aces = −1; 8/9 neutral. Running count only.

systems.name: Canfield Expert
systems.description: Balanced level-1 system (Canfield Expert). 3–7 = +1, 9 and tens = −1; 2/8 and aces neutral.

systems.name: C-K (Precision)
systems.description: Balanced level-2 system (C-K / Precision Count, Cant/Keen). 3–6 = +2, 2/7 = +1, 9 = −1, tens = −2, aces = −1; 8 neutral.

systems.name: C-R
systems.description: Balanced fractional system (C-R, Chambliss/Roginski). 3–6 = +1, 2/7 = +0.5, tens and aces = −1; 8/9 neutral. Fractional running count.

systems.name: DHM
systems.description: Balanced level-1 system (DHM, Gordon). 2–5 = +1, tens = −1; 6–9 and aces neutral.

systems.name: DMPro
systems.description: Balanced level-3 system (DMPro, Sharp — Wong Halves ×2). 3/4/6 = +2, 5 = +3, 2/7 = +1, 9 = −1, tens and aces = −2; 8 neutral.

systems.name: EBJ II
systems.description: Balanced level-2 system (EBJ II). 2–6 = +2, 7 = +1, 9 = −1, tens and aces = −2; 8 neutral.

systems.name: EBJ II-U
systems.description: Unbalanced level-2 system (EBJ II-U). 2–6 = +2, 7 = +1, tens and aces = −2; 8/9 neutral. Running count only.

systems.name: EBJ III
systems.description: Balanced level-3 system (EBJ III). 3/4/6 = +2, 5 = +3, 2/7 = +1, 9 = −1, tens and aces = −2; 8 neutral.

systems.name: EBJ III-U
systems.description: Unbalanced level-3 system (EBJ III-U). 2/3/4/6 = +2, 5 = +3, 7 = +1, 9 = −1, tens and aces = −2; 8 neutral. Running count only.

systems.name: Graham 2
systems.description: Balanced level-2 system (Graham 2). 2–7 = +1, tens = −1, aces = −2; 8/9 neutral.

systems.name: Griffin
systems.description: Balanced level-1 system (Griffin). 4–7 = +1, tens = −1; 2/3/8/9 and aces neutral.

systems.name: Griffin 3
systems.description: Balanced level-3 system (Griffin 3). 3/4/6/7 = +2, 5 = +3, 2/8 = +1, 9 = −1, tens = −3; aces neutral.

systems.name: Griffin 4
systems.description: Balanced level-4 system (Griffin 4). 5 = +4, 4/6/7 = +3, 3 = +2, 2/8 = +1, 9 = −1, tens = −4; aces neutral.

systems.name: Griffin 5
systems.description: Balanced level-5 system (Griffin 5). 5 = +5, 4/6 = +4, 7 = +3, 2/3 = +2, 8 = +1, 9 = −1, tens = −5; aces neutral.

systems.name: Hi-Opt I
systems.description: Balanced level-1 system (Hi-Opt I). 3–6 = +1, tens = −1; 2/7/8/9 and aces neutral. Full play adds an ace side count, not drilled here.

systems.name: Hi-Opt II
systems.description: Balanced level-2 system (Hi-Opt II). 4/5 = +2, 2/3/6/7 = +1, tens = −2; 8/9 and aces neutral. Full play adds an ace side count, not drilled here.

systems.name: HNF
systems.description: Unbalanced level-2 system (HNF). 4/5 = +2, 2/3/6/7 and aces = +1, tens = −2; 8/9 neutral. Running count only.

systems.name: J. Noir
systems.description: Unbalanced ten count (J. Noir). 2–9 = +1, tens and aces = −2. Running count only.

systems.name: Lima
systems.description: Unbalanced system (Lima). 3–7 = +1, aces = −1; 2/8/9 and tens neutral. Running count only.

systems.name: Mentor
systems.description: Balanced level-2 system (Mentor, Renzey). 3–6 = +2, 2/7 = +1, 9 = −1, tens = −2, aces = −1; 8 neutral.

systems.name: Olsen TruCount
systems.description: Unbalanced fractional system (Olsen TruCount). 5 = +2, 2/3/4/6 = +1, 7/9 = +0.5, tens and aces = −1; 8 neutral. Running count only.

systems.name: Revere Five-Count
systems.description: Unbalanced single-card count (Revere Five-Count). Only the 5 counts, as +1; every other card is neutral. Running count only.

systems.name: Revere Plus-Minus
systems.description: Balanced level-1 system (Revere Plus-Minus). 2–6 = +1, 9 and tens = −1; 7/8 and aces neutral.

systems.name: Revere Point Count
systems.description: Balanced level-2 system (Revere Point Count). 3–6 = +2, 2/7 = +1, tens and aces = −2; 8/9 neutral.

systems.name: Silver Fox
systems.description: Balanced level-1 system (Silver Fox). 2–7 = +1, 9, tens and aces = −1; 8 neutral.

systems.name: T-Hop 1
systems.description: Unbalanced level-1 system (T-Hop 1, Hopper). 3–7 = +1, tens = −1; 2/8/9 and aces neutral. Running count only.

systems.name: T-Hop 2
systems.description: Unbalanced level-2 system (T-Hop 2, Hopper). 4/5/6 = +2, 2/3/7 = +1, tens = −2; 8/9 and aces neutral. Running count only.

systems.name: Tri-Level
systems.description: Balanced level-2 system (Tri-Level). 2/3/4/6/7 = +1, 5 = +2, 9 and tens = −1, aces = −2; 8 neutral.

systems.name: UBZ II
systems.description: Unbalanced level-2 system (UBZ II, George C). 3–6 = +2, 2/7 = +1, tens = −2, aces = −1; 8/9 neutral. Running count only.

systems.name: Uston Ace-Five
systems.description: Balanced two-card count (Uston Ace-Five). 5 = +1, aces = −1; everything else neutral. A simple bet-sizing count.

systems.name: Uston Adv Plus-Minus
systems.description: Balanced level-1 system (Uston Advanced Plus-Minus). 3–7 = +1, tens and aces = −1; 2/8/9 neutral.

systems.name: Uston APC
systems.description: Balanced level-3 system (Uston APC, Advanced Point Count). 5 = +3, 3/4/6/7 = +2, 2/8 = +1, 9 = −1, tens = −3; aces neutral. Full play adds an ace side count, not drilled here.

systems.name: Uston SS
systems.description: Unbalanced level-3 system (Uston SS). 5 = +3, 2/3/4/6 = +2, 7 = +1, 9 = −1, tens and aces = −2; 8 neutral. Running count only.

systems.name: Victor Adv Point
systems.description: Balanced level-3 system (Victor Advanced Point Count). 5 = +3, 2/3/4/6/7 = +2, 9 = −1, tens = −3; 8 and aces neutral.

systems.name: Zen Count
systems.description: Balanced level-2 system (Zen Count). 4/5/6 = +2, 2/3/7 = +1, tens = −2, aces = −1; 8/9 neutral.

systems.name: Red Seven
systems.description: Unbalanced color-dependent system (Red Seven, Snyder). 2–6 = +1, red 7 = +1 and black 7 = 0, tens and aces = −1; 8/9 neutral. Running count only.

systems.name: KISS 2
systems.description: Unbalanced color-dependent system (KISS 2, Renzey). Black 2 = +1 and red 2 = 0, 3–6 = +1, tens = −1; 7/8/9 and aces neutral. Running count only.

systems.name: KISS 3
systems.description: Unbalanced color-dependent system (KISS 3, Renzey). Black 2 = +1 and red 2 = 0, 3–7 = +1, tens and aces = −1; 8/9 neutral. Running count only.

systems.name: Griffin Ultimate
systems.description: Balanced computer-only system (Griffin Ultimate). Extreme per-rank weights (aces −60 up to fives +70, tens −50) optimized by computer — far too complex to play by hand, included only for completeness.

systems.name: Thorp Ultimate
systems.description: Balanced computer-only system (Thorp Ultimate). High-resolution weights (5 = +11, 4 = +8, aces = −9, tens = −7, …; 8 neutral) optimized by computer — impractical for human play, included only for completeness.

systems.name: Graham 7
systems.description: Balanced level-7 system (Graham 7). 2/3/6 = +4, 4 = +5, 5 = +7, 7 = +3, 9 = −1, tens = −5, aces = −6; 8 neutral. An impractically high level for human play, included for completeness.

systems.name: Griffin 7
systems.description: Balanced level-7 system (Griffin 7). 2/3 = +4, 4 = +5, 5 = +7, 6 = +5, 7 = +3, 9 = −2, tens = −5, aces = −6; 8 neutral. An impractically high level for human play, included for completeness.

systems.name: Tek's
systems.description: Balanced inverted level-1 system (Tek's). The mirror image of a normal count: low cards 2–7 = −1, while 9, tens and aces = +1 and 8 is neutral, so the running count runs opposite in sign to Hi-Lo. A curiosity, not a practical advantage system.

systems.name: Wilson APC
systems.description: Balanced inverted system (Wilson APC). Another mirror-image count: 2–9 = −1, tens = +1, aces = +4, running opposite in sign to a normal system. A curiosity, not recommended for play.
